list.name: alpha_run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT run_id AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM alpha_research_runs ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 200
list.definition: SELECT run_id AS __text, run_id AS __value FROM alpha_research_runs ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 200

list.name: alpha_symbol
list.label: Symbol
list.query: SELECT symbol AS __text, symbol AS __value FROM (SELECT symbol FROM alpha_research_run_signals WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' UNION SELECT symbol FROM alpha_research_run_targets WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' UNION SELECT symbol FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' UNION SELECT symbol FROM alpha_research_run_trades WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}') symbols ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT symbol AS __text, symbol AS __value FROM (SELECT symbol FROM alpha_research_run_signals WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' UNION SELECT symbol FROM alpha_research_run_targets WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' UNION SELECT symbol FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' UNION SELECT symbol FROM alpha_research_run_trades WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}') symbols ORDER BY 1

targets.rawSql: SELECT backtest_edge_after_cost_bps AS value FROM alpha_research_runs WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}'
SELECT forward_edge_after_cost_bps AS value FROM alpha_research_runs WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}'
SELECT backtest_trade_count AS value FROM alpha_research_runs WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}'
SELECT forward_trade_count AS value FROM alpha_research_runs WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}'

SELECT generated_at, strategy_family, mode, exchange, signal_bar_minutes, forward_hours, rebalance_cadence_hours, factor_lookback_days, selection_quantile, trend_score_mode, residualization_mode, residualization_beta_mode, residualization_market_proxy_mode, tail_weighting_mode, funding_overlay_mode, exit_overlay_mode, validation_accepted, backtest_accepted, forward_accepted, backtest_net_return_pct, forward_net_return_pct, backtest_calmar, forward_calmar, grafana_path FROM alpha_research_runs WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}'

SELECT signal_rank, symbol, direction, expected_net_edge_bps, confidence, score, empirical_score, residual_rank, trend_score, trend_agreement, funding_score, open_interest_score, market_beta, close, predicted_volatility FROM alpha_research_run_signals WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY signal_rank

SELECT target_rank, symbol, direction, weight_fraction, leverage_multiplier, expected_net_edge_bps, expected_cost_bps, turnover_delta_fraction, confidence, rationale FROM alpha_research_run_targets WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY target_rank

SELECT trade_index, symbol, direction, entry_time, exit_time, entry_price, exit_price, pnl_pct, max_favorable_pnl_pct, profit_giveback_pct, reason, segment FROM alpha_research_run_trades WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY trade_index
SELECT time AS "time", close AS "Close" FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT entry_time AS "time", entry_price AS "Entry" FROM alpha_research_run_trades WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT exit_time AS "time", exit_price AS "Exit" FROM alpha_research_run_trades WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", score AS "Score" FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", expected_net_edge_bps AS "Expected Edge" FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", confidence AS "Confidence" FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", desired_weight AS "Desired Weight" FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", applied_delta AS "Applied Delta" FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", position_weight AS "Position Weight" FROM alpha_research_run_symbol_points WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' AND symbol = '${alpha_symbol}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", gross_exposure_fraction AS "Gross" FROM alpha_research_run_portfolio_snapshots WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", long_exposure_fraction AS "Long" FROM alpha_research_run_portfolio_snapshots WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", short_exposure_fraction AS "Short" FROM alpha_research_run_portfolio_snapshots WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", net_exposure_fraction AS "Net" FROM alpha_research_run_portfolio_snapshots WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", equity AS "Equity" FROM alpha_research_run_portfolio_snapshots WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", turnover_fraction AS "Turnover" FROM alpha_research_run_portfolio_snapshots WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", kill_switch_utilization AS "Kill Switch" FROM alpha_research_run_portfolio_snapshots WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", open_positions AS "Open Positions" FROM alpha_research_run_portfolio_snapshots WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", regime_score AS "Regime Score" FROM alpha_research_run_regimes WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", market_trend_score AS "Market Trend" FROM alpha_research_run_regimes WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", breadth AS "Breadth" FROM alpha_research_run_regimes WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", dispersion AS "Dispersion" FROM alpha_research_run_regimes WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", pc1_share_z AS "PC1 Share Z" FROM alpha_research_run_compression_diagnostics WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", future_factor_return_bps AS "Next 72h Factor Return" FROM alpha_research_run_compression_diagnostics WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
SELECT time AS "time", co_momentum_z AS "Co-Momentum Z" FROM alpha_research_run_compression_diagnostics WHERE run_id = '${alpha_run_id}' ORDER BY 1
